query:
UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Thaa Atoll is a remote and culturally rich atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences. The atoll features pristine beaches, excellent diving and snorkeling, and local islands with traditional Maldivian culture and heritage.',
  overview = 'Thaa Atoll is a remote atoll offering authentic Maldivian culture and excellent diving conditions in a secluded setting.'
WHERE name = 'Thaa Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Laamu Atoll is a surf and eco-focused atoll offering pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic local island experiences. Known for its natural beauty and commitment to sustainable tourism.',
  overview = 'Laamu Atoll is a surf and eco-focused atoll with pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic local island experiences.'
WHERE name = 'Laamu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll is a southern atoll with deep channels and pristine coral formations. This atoll offers excellent diving and snorkeling in a more remote and secluded setting.',
  overview = 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll features deep channels and pristine coral formations, offering excellent diving in a remote setting.'
WHERE name = 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll is a remote southern atoll featuring pristine coral reefs and abundant marine life. This atoll offers excellent diving and snorkeling opportunities in a secluded setting.',
  overview = 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll is a remote southern atoll with pristine coral reefs and excellent diving conditions.'
WHERE name = 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Gnaviyani Atoll is a unique single-island atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences. Fuvahmulah is known for its pristine beaches, excellent diving, and unique geographical features.',
  overview = 'Gnaviyani Atoll is a unique single-island atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences and excellent diving.'
WHERE name = 'Gnaviyani Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Addu Atoll is the southernmost atoll of the Maldives, featuring pristine beaches, excellent diving, and WWII heritage sites. This atoll offers a unique blend of history, culture, and natural beauty.',
  overview = 'Addu Atoll is the southernmost atoll with pristine beaches, excellent diving, and fascinating WWII heritage sites.'
WHERE name = 'Addu Atoll';
